name: New England Lamb Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large Dutch oven, heat oil.
2. Brown lamb and onions.
3. Stir in flour; mix well.
4. Gradually add broth. Bring to a boil, stirring to remove browned bits from the pan.
5. Add carrots, leeks, 1 tablespoon of parsley, bay leaf, rosemary, thyme, salt, and pepper.
6. Spoon into a greased 3-quart casserole.
7. Cover with potatoes and dot with butter.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 1 1/2-2 hours or until the meat is tender and the potatoes are golden brown.
9. Garnish with remaining parsley.
Yield: 6-8 servings
